name: dap-dbgeng
description: Task runner for the dap-dbgeng workspace. The project is C++ (CMake/Ninja/vcpkg) with a Python protocol generator and a VS Code extension; this package.json only provides convenient `npm run` entry points from the repo root.

scripts.test:all: npm run configure && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run configure && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.build:sys: pwsh scripts/With-DevEnv.ps1 cmake -S test-targets/sys -B test-targets/sys/build -G "Visual Studio 17 2022" -A x64 && pwsh scripts/With-DevEnv.ps1 cmake --build test-targets/sys/build --config Debug
scripts.build:vsix: npm run configure:release && npm run build:release && npm run bundle:adapter && npm --prefix vscode install && npm --prefix vscode run build
